entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop evaluated for forage quality and genetic diversity.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic characteristics among hybrid parents of pearl millet.

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Physical characteristics of the plant measured across different cutting intervals.

entities.name: SSRS
entities.description: Simple sequence repeats used as molecular markers to assess genetic distance.

entities.name: GBS
entities.description: Genotyping by sequencing used to identify single nucleotide polymorphisms.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphisms identified through GBS for genetic analysis.

entities.name: GENETIC DISTANCE
entities.description: A measure of genetic divergence between parents used to predict heterosis.

entities.name: CRUDE PROTEIN
entities.description: A forage quality trait denoted as CP, measuring protein content.

entities.name: IN VITRO ORGANIC MATTER DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: A forage quality trait denoted as IVOMD, measuring the digestibility of organic matter.

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The superior performance of hybrids compared to their parents for specific traits.

entities.name: GFY
entities.description: Green Fodder Yield, a forage trait used for predicting heterosis.

entities.name: DFY
entities.description: Dry Fodder Yield, a forage trait used for predicting heterosis.

entities.name: FORAGE QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: A group of traits including CP, IVOMD, GFY, and DFY that determine forage value.
